display.purpose: Screen heroes and headline moments only.

label.purpose: Pixel labels, kickers, tab text; often uppercase.

body.purpose: All reading-weight text: lists, paragraphs, prompts.

body-strong.purpose: Emphasized values, peek titles, snail names.

shadows.name: pixel-shadow
shadows.purpose: Signature hard sticker edge (zero blur) on cards, sheets, panels. Android falls back to elevation:4.

shadows.name: soft-shadow
shadows.purpose: The only permitted blur: chrome floating over the live map (recenter FAB, markers).

motion.name: sheet-spring
motion.purpose: Map detail sheet snap between peek and expanded.

motion.name: press-depress
motion.purpose: Buttons sit down on press; the bevel collapse reads as physical depression.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single grape call-to-action. Chunky outline plus a deep bottom bevel; sits down on press.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; min-height:46px; padding:9px 16px; background:#7c5cff; color:#ffffff; font-family:'PressStart2P_400Regular', monospace; font-size:10px; letter-spacing:0.5px; text-transform:uppercase; border:2px solid #2a2336; border-bottom-width:5px; border-bottom-color:#5a3fd6; border-radius:12px; cursor:pointer; transition: background 0.12s ease-out, border-bottom-width 0.06s ease-out, transform 0.06s ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background:#8c6fff; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background:#5a3fd6; border-bottom-width:2px; transform:translateY(3px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline:none; box-shadow:0 0 0 3px #ece6ff; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Supporting action on Candy Sky; same chunky build as primary.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; min-height:46px; padding:9px 16px; background:#37b6e9; color:#ffffff; font-family:'PressStart2P_400Regular', monospace; font-size:10px; letter-spacing:0.5px; text-transform:uppercase; border:2px solid #2a2336; border-bottom-width:5px; border-bottom-color:#1d8fc4; border-radius:12px; cursor:pointer; transition: background 0.12s ease-out, border-bottom-width 0.06s ease-out, transform 0.06s ease-out; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background:#54c2ee; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { background:#1d8fc4; border-bottom-width:2px; transform:translateY(3px); }

components.name: Slime Chip
components.description: Currency pill: gold fill, plum-ink pixel label, leading coin glyph.
components.html: 240
components.css: .ds-chip-slime { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:5px; padding:4px 10px; background:#ffc83d; color:#2a2336; font-family:'PressStart2P_400Regular', monospace; font-size:10px; letter-spacing:0.5px; border:2px solid #2a2336; border-radius:999px; }

components.name: Card / Sheet
components.description: Calm flat container: panel fill, plum-ink outline, single hard pixel-shadow lift. Never nested.
components.html:
GARDEN SNAIL

Carrying “Buy milk”. 8.0 km left.
components.css: .ds-card { background:#fffdf7; border:2px solid #2a2336; border-radius:16px; padding:16px; box-shadow:0 3px 0 0 #2a2336; } .ds-card-title { font-family:'PressStart2P_400Regular', monospace; font-size:13px; letter-spacing:0.5px; color:#2a2336; margin:0 0 8px; } .ds-card-body { font-family:'Fredoka_600SemiBold', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size:14px; line-height:20px; color:#6f6680; margin:0; }

components.name: Map Detail Peek (empty)
components.description: Signature: the collapsed map sheet with no snail selected. Centered, muted teaching cue with a drag handle.
components.html: Tap a snail for details
components.css: .ds-peek { background:#fffdf7; border:2px solid #2a2336; border-top-left-radius:16px; border-top-right-radius:16px; padding:8px 18px 10px; display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; gap:6px; box-shadow:0 3px 0 0 #2a2336; } .ds-peek-handle { width:34px; height:4px; border-radius:2px; background:#2a2336; } .ds-peek-prompt { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:7px; padding-top:4px; font-family:'Fredoka_700Bold', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size:14px; color:#6f6680; }

narrative.overview: Carrier Snail is a warm, paper-cozy world with loud, tactile furniture. The room is unhurried: a cream-paper canvas and plum-ink lettering, never stark. The furniture is where the play lives: chunky, beveled candy controls that beg to be pressed, postage-bright accents, and pixel-arcade lettering on scores and labels. The system commits to a light canvas on purpose; candy saturation reads as sweet, not radioactive, only because it sits on warm cream. It rejects neon-on-black gamer UI, flat Material sterility, decorative blur, and the calm sage palette it replaced.
keyCharacteristics: Warm light canvas (cream paper), never pure white or pure black.
Candy accents used like postage stamps: punctuation, not wallpaper. Grape is the one CTA voice.
Chunky, tactile controls: 2px ink outline plus a hard bottom bevel in a deeper tone.
Dual type system: Press Start 2P for titles/labels/scores, Fredoka for body and dense numerals.
Depth from hard pixel shadows and layered bevels, never soft decorative blur.
Smooth illustrated snails ride over pixel-styled chrome.

rules.name: The Tinted-Neutral Rule
rules.body: No element ever uses pure #fff or pure #000. Backgrounds tint warm toward cream; text and borders tint cool toward plum-ink.

rules.name: The One-Grape Rule
rules.body: Grape is the only primary-action color. If two things on a screen are both grape, one is wrong. Decorative brights never stand in for the CTA.

rules.name: The Semantic-Token Rule
rules.body: Consume semantic roles (colors.primary, text.body) and never raw hex or the private palette outside src/theme/.

rules.name: The Two-Font Rule
rules.body: Press Start 2P for titles, labels, and scores. Fredoka for everything you actually read. Body copy in the pixel font is forbidden.

rules.name: The No-Faux-Weight Rule
rules.body: Never simulate weight on the pixel font; step the size or switch to Fredoka Bold.

rules.name: The Layered-Bevel Rule
rules.body: Chunk on buttons comes from a thick (4 to 5px) bottom border in the deeper bevel tone, not from pixelShadow.

rules.name: The No-Decorative-Blur Rule
rules.body: Soft blur is permitted only for chrome floating over the map. Glassmorphism and ambient drop-shadows as decoration are forbidden.

dos: Do consume semantic tokens: colors.primary, text.body, radii.md, space.lg, pixelShadow, imported from ../theme.
Do keep neutrals tinted: warm cream backgrounds, cool plum-ink text and borders.
Do give pressable controls a 2px plum-ink outline and a deeper-tone bottom bevel.
Do set titles, labels, and scores in Press Start 2P, and all reading-weight text in Fredoka.
Do reserve grape for the single primary action / current selection on a screen.
Do keep snail PNG sprites smooth and anti-aliased; only the chrome is pixel-styled.
donts: Don't hardcode hex or reach into the private palette; use the semantic roles.
Don't set body copy, ETAs, or multi-line text in Press Start 2P.
Don't put the candy palette on a dark/black background; this system is light.
Don't revert to the old calm sage/cream palette; it is superseded.
Don't add decorative blur or glassmorphism; the only soft shadow is chrome over the map.
Don't nest cards, lean on hairline-only borders, or use soft drop-shadow as the primary depth cue.
